steps: Harvest cells and wash in cold 1X PBS
Resuspend cells in 10 mL of ice-cold SB. Incubate for 00:05:00 . Spin 400 x g, °C, 10 minutes .
Remove supernatant and resuspend in 10 mL GSB Volume of GSB should be at least 5 times the volume of cell pellet
Vortex lightly while adding 10 mL of LyB
Incubate on ice for 00:05:00 Add 25 mL of LyB and centrifuge 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes .
Flick to loosen pellet and resuspend in 25 mL of LyB. Centrifuge 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes
Remove supernatant and resuspend in 10 mL of FB. Take 10 µL for cell count.
Centrifuge 900 x g, °C, 6 minutes and resuspend using wide-end pipette tips in FB to a maximum concentration of 5x10^6 nuclei per 25 µL of FB.
Nuclei can be stored at -80 °C for months.

Prepare fresh 2x Nuclear run-on buffer (NRO). ( 25 µL /sample) 10 mM Tris-HCl ph8 5 mM MgCl 2 300 mM KCl 1 mM DTT 500 μM ATP 500 μM GTP 500 μM 4-thio-UTP 2 μM CTP 200 μ/ml Superase-in 1% Sarkosyl (N-Laurylsarcosine sodium salt solution) Per library, use 0.5-5x10^6 nuclei
Warm the NRO buffer at 30 °C .
Thaw nuclei On ice . 5-10% drosophila nuclei can be added to your sample as spike-in if not using 4S-U labelled drosophila RNA in step 26.
Mix 25 µL of thawed nuclei solution with 25 µL of 2xNRO buffer. Pipette up and down 15 times using end-cut pipette tip.
Incubate 00:07:00 at 30 °C .
Add 150 µL Trizol LS. Vortex. Incubate 00:05:00 at Room temperature . STOP POINT: Freeze with liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C
Add 40 µL of chloroform, shake vigorously by hand for 00:00:15
Incubate 00:02:00 at Room temperature .
Centrifuge at 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes .
Transfer upper, aqueous phase into new 1.5 mL centrifuge tube.
Add 100 µL of isopropanol to precipitate RNA and incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00 . Can add 1-2 ul of 2 μg/μL glycogen to allow for visualization of pellet with lower RNA concentrations.
Centrifuge at 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Wash RNA pellet using 1 mL of cold 75 % ethanol Centrifuge at 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Completely remove ethanol and air-dry pellet. Dissolve in 100 µL of nuclease-free water.
Determine concentration by Nanodrop or Qubit.
Transfer 30 µg of RNA to a 1.5 ml tube and add water up to 100 µL . Save 5 μl of unfragmented RNA to be run on TapeStation as a control for fragmented RNA and to check quality of RNA.
Add 5-10% of labelled spike-in RNA if using instead of drosophila nuclei.
Fragment RNA using Bioruptor with the following settings using: 1 cycle: 30 sec / 30 sec ON / OFF at high settings.
Transfer fragmented RNA to 2 ml tube.
Analyze fragmentation efficiency of fragmented versus unfragmented RNA on Agilent 2200 TapeStation.
Sonicated RNA can be snap-frozen in liquid nitrogen and stored at -80 °C
Incubate RNA at 65 °C for 00:02:00 , then On ice for 00:05:00 .
Prepare Biotin-RNA mix in 1.5 ml tube. Follow the order: up to 30 µg of fragmented RNA in 100 µL H20 up to 140 µL μl 5 µL HEPES pH 7.4 5 µL 0.5M EDTA 50 µL Diluted MTS-Biotin
Incubate in the dark at 24 °C and 800 rpm, °C, for 00:30:00 .
Add 160 µL of chloroform to the RNA-biotin in the 2 mL phase-lock tube and mix by manually shaking the tube.
Centrifuge 16000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes .
Remove supernatant.
Wash pellet with 1 mL of ice-cold 75% ethanol. Centrifuge 10006 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Remove supernatant.
Spin quickly at 4 °C and remove remaining supernatant with 200 μl and 10 μl pipettes. Biotinylated RNA should NOT dry.
Resuspend RNA in 44 µL of nuclease-free water. Biotinylated RNA can be stored at -80 °C .
Prepare Wash Buffer (WB): 100 mM Tris pH 7.5 10 mM EDTA pH 8.0 1M NaCl 0.1% (vol/vol) Tween-20
Leave half volume of WB at room temperature and heat the other half at 65 °C .
Prepare the beads:
Take 25 µL of beads per sample.
Wash the beads twice with 2 volumes ( 50 µL per sample) of wash buffer.
Resuspend in 1 Volume ( 25 µL per sample) of wash buffer.
Incubate at 65 °C for 00:10:00 . Place on ice for 00:05:00 .
Add 25 µL of prepared Invitrogen streptavidin beads to 50 µL of RNA-biotin.
Incubate at 4 °C for 00:15:00 in rotation.
Transfer tubes to a magnetic rack. Remove supernatant. Do not disturb beads.
Wash at least 3 times with 200 µL of warm ( 65 °C ) WB.
Wash at least 3 times with 200 µL of room temperature WB.
Resuspend beads in 25 µL of 100 mM DTT and incubate 00:05:00 .
Transfer tubes to the magnetic rack. Collect the 4-thio-labeled RNA in a new tube.
Repeat steps 62-63 and collect the eluted RNA in the same tube (50 μl total volume).
Add 150 µL nuclease-free water to the samples to final volume of 200 μl.
Use 1 µL to measure concentration of labelled RNA by Qubit fluorometer.
Libraries can be prepared with NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep or other library prep kits.
Centrifuge full speed 21000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Transfer upper phase into new tube (appr 200 µL ).
If needed at 1-2μl of 2 μg/μl Glycogen to allow for visualization of pellet with lower RNA concentrations.
Add 1/10 volume (20 μl) of 5 M NaCl and mix.
Add 1 volume (200 μl) of isopropanol and mix for 15 sec manually.
Add 5 µL of TURBO DNase buffer to the RNA-biotin.
Add 1 µL of TURBO DNAse.
Incubate at 37 °C for 00:30:00 .
Add 1 µL of inactivation reagent.
Incubate at Room temperature for 00:05:00 .
Centrifuge 10000 x g, Room temperature, 2 minutes .
Transfer RNA-biotin solution in a new tube.
Add 160 µL of chloroform to the labelled RNA and mix
Centrifuge 21000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Transfer upper, aqueous phase into new 1.5 mL centrifuge tube.
Add 2 µL of 2 μg/μl glycogen and mix.
Add 1/10 volume (20 μl) of 5 M NaCl and mix.
Add 1 volume (200 μL) of isopropanol and mix.
Centrifuge 21000 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes .
Remove supernatant.
Wash pellet with 1 µL of ice-cold 75 % ethanol.
Centrifuge 21000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Remove supernatant.
Quick spin 21000 x g, 4 °C, 15 seconds and remove remaining supernatant with 10 μL pipette.
Resuspend RNA in 6 µL DEPC-treated H2O.
creator: Elisa Barbieri
